translations.en: Snake_Charmer
translations.zh: 馴蛇者

translations.en: an old winged gargoyle.
translations.zh: 年邁之有翼魔像。

translations.en: The gargoyle shouts, "An-bal-sil-fer!" and flees!
translations.zh: 魔像大喊：「An-bal-sil-fer！」然後逃走！

translations.en: The gargoyle shouts, "The False Prophet!" and flees!
translations.zh: 魔像大喊：「偽先知！」然後逃走！

translations.en: "To feel honored by your visit, False Prophet."
translations.zh: 「偽先知光臨，深感榮幸。」

translations.en: The gargoyle seems afraid of you at first.
translations.zh: 魔像起初似乎對你心存恐懼。

translations.en: Then he notices the amulet around your neck.
translations.zh: 繼而他注意到你頸間的護符。

translations.en: "To--to feel honored to address you, False Prophet."
translations.zh: 「能——能向偽先知問候，深感榮幸。」

translations.en: "To ask what you wish of a simple @snakecharmer?"
translations.zh: 「問汝想從一介@snakecharmer馴蛇者處得到什麼？」

translations.en: The gargoyle laughs nervously.
translations.zh: 魔像緊張地笑了。

translations.en: "To lack a name, of course.
translations.zh: 「當然，吾沒有名字。

translations.en: "To be called simply by my @job, snakecharmer."
translations.zh: 「只被以@job職業稱之，馴蛇者。」

translations.en: "To summon the silver @snake, and to direct the young warriors in defeating it."
translations.zh: 「召喚銀色@snake巨蛇，並指引年輕武士將其擊敗。」

translations.en: "Then to extract the venom so that I can make the @battle-drug."
translations.zh: 「而後提取蛇毒，以製作@battle戰鬥藥劑。」

translations.en: "To make the drug for our bravest warriors, who take it and turn into fighting daemons!"
translations.zh: 「為吾族最勇敢之武士製此藥劑，服之便化身為戰鬥惡魔！」

translations.en: "To express sorrow that the drug is fatal, but to express awe and respect for the warriors' sacrifice."
translations.zh: 「此藥必致死，吾深感哀憫；然對武士之犧牲，吾深懷敬畏。」

translations.en: "To use the great @horn to summon the silver snake."
translations.zh: 「以巨大之@horn號角召喚銀色巨蛇。」

translations.en: "To always require many warriors to defeat the creature!"
translations.zh: 「擊敗此生靈，向來需要眾多武士！」

translations.en: "To find the horn just north of my house."
translations.zh: 「號角就在吾居所以北。」

translations.en: "But to warn you never to blow the horn!"
translations.zh: 「然要警告汝，切勿吹響號角！」

translations.en: "To be in grave peril from the snake without a squad of warriors!"
translations.zh: 「若無一隊武士在側，巨蛇所帶來的危險極為致命！」

translations.en: "To express my thanks for the sacrifice you have chosen to make!"
translations.zh: 「對汝所選擇之犧牲，深表感激！」

translations.en: "To be but a simple snake charmer, unfamiliar with matters such as that."
translations.zh: 「吾不過是個普通馴蛇者，對此等事宜並不熟悉。」

translator_notes: 馴蛇者為魔像族特殊職業NPC，負責召喚銀蛇、製作戰鬥藥劑。關鍵 quest 資訊：號角、銀蛇、致死藥劑。語氣謙遜帶恐懼。
